title: Codex Security：现已开放研究预览
description: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用安全代理，它通过分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的误报来检测、验证并修复复杂的安全漏洞。

titleEn: Codex Security: Now open for research preview
descriptionZh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用安全代理，它通过分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的误报来检测、验证并修复复杂的安全漏洞。
descriptionEn: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, verify, and remediate complex security vulnerabilities with higher confidence and fewer false positives.

descriptionEn: Descript uses the OpenAI model to implement large-scale multilingual video dubbing, and double-optimizes the semantics and rhythm of translation, so that the dubbing sounds natural and smooth in different languages.

title: 2 亿美元与底线：为什么 Anthropic 敢于对五角大楼说“不”？
description: 当五角大楼要求不受限制地使用人工智能进行“任何合法用途”时，Anthropic援引其自立的“克劳德宪法”断然拒绝，甚至不惜以失去巨额合同并被贴上“供应链风险”的标签为代价。
titleZh: 2 亿美元与底线：为什么 Anthropic 敢于对五角大楼说“不”？
titleEn: $$200 Million vs. A Bottom Line: Why Did Anthropic Dare to Say "No" to the Pentagon?
descriptionZh: 当五角大楼要求不受限制地使用人工智能进行“任何合法用途”时，Anthropic援引其自立的“克劳德宪法”断然拒绝，甚至不惜以失去巨额合同并被贴上“供应链风险”的标签为代价。
descriptionEn: When the Pentagon demanded unrestricted access to AI for "any lawful use," Anthropic cited its self-established "Claude Constitution" and flatly refused, even at the cost of losing a massive contract and being labeled a "supply chain risk." This is far from a commercial dispute; it is the first public showdown concerning technological ethics, the boundaries of corporate private power, and national sovereignty following the deep militarization of AI capabilities.
